message:
fix: null-safety guards across 4 card components (#5190-5194)

- DeploymentProgress: guard readyReplicas/replicas with ?? 0 (#5190)
- HardwareHealthCard: guard cluster toLowerCase/localeCompare (#5191)
- ComputeOverview: guard cluster startsWith/split (#5193)
- ClusterChangelog: guard event.object/message (#5194)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
